scenes.visual: Camera pans over a sleek GitHub repository page for 'obra/superpowers'. The star counter animates from 0 to 93,985, with tiny golden stars bursting outward.
scenes.narration: Welcome to obra/superpowers, the open-source project lighting up GitHub with over 93k stars.
scenes.style: Minimalistic UI mockup with glossy, flat design elements; soft glow effects on stars; modern sans-serif typography.

scenes.visual: Split-screen montage of developers from different continents typing in VS Code, reviewing pull requests, and commenting on issues. Code snippets flow like neon particles.
scenes.narration: Built by a global community of creators, each commit adds a new superpower to the toolkit.
scenes.style: Dynamic motion graphics with vibrant cyber-punk palette; code flows as luminous trails; subtle depth-of-field blur.

scenes.visual: Showcase of real-world projects made with Superpowers: an indie pixel-art game, an interactive art installation, and a VR experience.
scenes.narration: From indie games to immersive installations, superpowers turn ideas into reality.
scenes.style: Semi-realistic cinematic render; soft lighting, slight film grain; screens have a slight glow to emphasize the projects.

scenes.visual: Close-up of the GitHub star button being clicked, then a fork button animation. Avatars raise their hands, forming a constellation that shapes the repository logo.
scenes.narration: Join the movement — star, fork, and add your own superpower today.
scenes.style: Uplifting, bright color scheme; animated button presses with particle bursts; final logo formed by stars.

scenes.visual: Screen capture of the GitHub repository showing the title, description, and the 480,457-star count. The camera slowly zooms in on the star badge with animated particles.
scenes.narration: With over 480k stars, codecrafters-io's 'Build Your Own X' inspires developers worldwide to reinvent classic tools from scratch.
scenes.style: Clean, modern UI overlay with bright accent colors, slight motion graphics, and a crisp high-resolution feel.

scenes.visual: Close-up of a developer's hands typing on a mechanical keyboard. The terminal shows a code editor with syntax-highlighted snippets setting up a basic Redis server.
scenes.narration: Pick a project — Redis, Git, a database — and start with the basics, guided by hands-on challenges.
scenes.style: Warm, cinematic lighting with shallow depth of field; code highlighted in vibrant syntax colors; slight film grain.

scenes.visual: Split-screen time-lapse: left side shows an empty project folder, right side shows it filling with source files, passing tests with green checkmarks, and a running demo.
scenes.narration: Each step unlocks a new layer of understanding, turning theory into tangible skill.
scenes.style: Dynamic, fast-cut editing with energetic rhythm; neon accents on progress indicators; vibrant color grading.

scenes.visual: Developer pushes the final commit; GitHub page updates in real time, the star count increments, and a badge appears: 'Your Own X'.
scenes.narration: Join the community, build your own X, and watch your skills — and your stars — grow.
scenes.style: Inspirational and uplifting tone with subtle lens flare, brand-consistent colors, and a smooth fade-out to the repo URL.
